1. the best service for the internet is very fast and the customer service is can you get when a problem with the internet
zero- has been my answer for 2yyears on these surveys/same problems 8 times, same results 1st time as the eighth time/
prompt and courteous service.  completed the return within a minute or two.
because the representative was very knowledgeable and did a great job

the new equipment i got fixed my problem and the process was easy and efficient once i got served. not perfect because the late morning opening of the store didn’t fit my schedule and i had to wait in line. and it went well only because i already knew not to bother with online or telephone help but to verify on my own that the equipment wasn’t working and bring it in
he was courteous, went to details and suggested why my internet is shutting down while online!!

i will give a 9 oit of ten. i signed up with xfinity in 2020 and just cancel my subscription because i am moving to another state with no xfinity coverage. overall, i had a very nice service of cable, and internet.only a few problems when i had to disconnect one of my 4 tv boxes in order to watch regular tv. or watch a whole recorded program first. very annoying flaw in the system. i can not believe that i am the only one that have 5 tvs in the house.
had to wait 5-10 minutes. replacement modem is not new.
your associate was very polite handled everything i asked for in a timely manner and thank me for coming in
you don’t care.
dekalb office is great
representative was very difficult to deal with. love to tell you what he can’t do.
came in to swap one box and replace another. store rep was very responsive, helpful, and quickly took care of my issue. thanks again for your help.
the store i visit @ 116 us 41b in schererville in. have the nicest people running it. they are always willing to help and the store is very clean and organized.
alex was great. he helped me purchase a phone and a watch and even looked up all of my promotional discounts that i did not even know i had.
the sales person was understanding, he was very helpful and explained everything.
service

it took me a week to remedy my defective boxes. then when i return the old boxes and had already installed the new boxes i had to reinstall the new boxes as they had made some sort of change to my account. frustrating!
0 xfinity does not show appreciation to long term loyal customers. my bill has almost tripled over the years. will soon look for alternatives.

the representative greeted me upon entering the store and asked how she could assist me. she promptly swapped out my faulty equipment and answered my questions. she was very pleasant and professional.
staff was completely friendly and very efficient, in the whole deal
friendly and awesome customer service

great service
friendly and helpful

the gentleman i talked with was super helpful & respectful. helped out and didnt try to oversell. just helped with what i needed.
had second phone transferred over and girl did a great job in a pretty short time. all was working when we left the evergreen park store.

a simple request turned into 2 calls and still not fixed. i simply wanted xfinity to tell fedex to deliver after 5:00 pm since a signature is needed. that's all. they put in a ticket and then the app said 14 days. the product will be delivered way before then. your support is incompetent
my ticket did not get resolved. and i waited for over an hour.
staff were welcoming, fast and professional!!

i walked into the xfinity store and all employees were focused on the soccer game. the person who helped me acted like i was an inconvenience, like interrupted the game he was watching. instead of carefully explaining what services i was losing with moving to streaming, he just said done. no details. no updated billing amount. i had to ask questions on basic information that should be shared. i would not recommend this location go anyone.
it should be obvious. good service!
ok

staff was friendly, helpful and knowledgeable. there was a newer employee who was really great. i think i heard it was her first day, but she is definitely a people person, and customers will be comfortable as we were dealing with her. her name was nevaeh. i will never forget that name. thanks again
was easy to contact the support, easy to connect my wifi, and easy to bring it back the router
great service
happy customer

polite professional service

the service is terrible! so many outages. i work from home and it almost cost me my job. i can never talk to a live person.  your chat is absolutely awful. plus, it’s way too expensive. i have to wait for a promotion that is a total scam.
friendly staff with excellent knowledge and great customer service at the michigan city, in store.
rich was great
you're store team was friendly and knowledgeable. wait time was 20 minutes to get my defective router replaced. you're chat and tech support lines i would rate at 1

alex, who helped me, was awesome. he was super efficient. i was amazed how short the visit was. he was respectful when i needed to type in my ssn by stepping away to give me privacy. i dreaded going to switch my mobile plan, but beyond relieved at how simple and quick the visit was. alex made the process painless. he would give me updates when my old plan was finally terminated and my line was transferred. i was amazed at how efficient he was with switching my phone line from verizon without needing me to call them. i cannot emphasize enough how great the experience was.
yes highly recommend
excellent service.
i haven't had service since monday, and they only changed the modem without providing it.
there was good customer service at the establishment

a representative that helped me over the phone made me agree to getting a door bell camera , saying i had to as i was doing addresses change..... i guess the worker person thought he was going to get a raise or something. i don't know, but it sucked having to return it
depends on the service needed

the person who helped me was friendly, professional and efficient.  there was a line of people and he was also helping his peer who was likely newer.  he did not miss a beat.  i cannot say enough nice things about him.
noah was very helpful
the customer service representative at the tinley park, il was the absolute sweetest.  he handled our difficult situation for two hours with such politeness and humor.
the gentleman that waited on me was extremely helpful and kind.
the people are very helpful but you have to wait for someone to be free to help you.

i've never (so far, knock on wood) had an issue that the store wasn't able to take care of. it's night and day from having to speak with representatives who don't speak english and all tell you something different while reading from the same script!
the sales person was nice. i didn’t get the price i was looking for. i took what i could get but i am still looking at other companies.

emily was an amazing help. i don't remember the guys name but he was tall and was training. he also did a very good job.  they both worked together as a team to help me get the best deal as possible. i already told my mom to switch and talk to them. thank you for taking the time and answering any questions i had.
nice young man

super easy to set up my ipad

exceptional service customer service - she was patient and was thoroughly professional and helpful ! i was fortunate to work with her!

the associate who took care of me at the store, daniel, i believe was his name… was very informative, extremely courteous and i felt like he genuinely cared about making sure he could meet my specific needs. overall he made my in store trip a very positive and awesome experience! that associate deserves high praise!
friendly, confident and competent service.
was helpful in an interesting situation

there were quite a few customers in the store. after waiting a few minutes, one of your employees noticed that i was just returning a router. so he came out from behind the counter, took my router, and then brought me my receipts very quickly, and then he went back to attending to whatever he was doing with the other customer.i know it was a holiday weekend, but i think you should have had one more employ behind the counter

emily, the person that helped me was very patient with all her customers. she was working alone and had several people waiting. everyone was patient and took their place in line. i’d recommend a simple numbering system. although we all were aware and respectful of who was next, who sat down and those just walking around. also on her end, perhaps a simple acknowledgment of people coming in. overall she was fantastic. for my service it would have been more helpful knowing that a coax cable hookup was needed for my internet installation. i was anticipating a plug and play from existing wiring now i have to wait another week for a tech to come in.
the rep was really nice. went above and beyond.
sarah was amazing!! and super helpful !!
he was helpful and attentive to my needs and i have social anxiety and he was easy to work with
excellent customer service

because the representative call me back and inform that i can take the modem and get another
noah and ty very helpful store reps
your employee was very nice and helpful!!! he gets a 12 out of 10

jordan was immediately helpful. we have been comcast customers since 1997 and have had very little issues since. we now have moved to a town that xfiniy doesn't serve. my husband called and canceled a few days before the move, however jordan at the store found that it had not been canceled!!! he then canceled our service and we returned our equipment. he made the cancelation and return very easy.
prompt, courteous and able to help me with what i needed

caleb was extremely patient with this older woman, and fully explained all details so they were clear to me. he is a trainee who was very personable and smiled a lot.

we were helped by an extremely good team from the moment we started. they had anwsers for all of our questions. the whole experience reminded me of customer service when it mattered and both of the people made us xfinity customers for life. thank you for staffing your stores with such people. your phone service almost made us switch to direct t.v instead of adding our phone lines with you. that area is impossible to deal with and rude beyond description.
being overcharged
the service rep was kind and patient.  i was frustrated to go without cable and internet for 5 days, including over a holiday weekend. my problem couldn't be corrected over the phone, i felt heard.
i was in and out in a matter of minutes. the process was quick, easy, and the individual helping me was able to do so efficiently.
she was very polite, easy transaction!!

the customer service representative,  mr jamal gave me excellent service

the clerk said it would be a 10-15 minute wait, but it ended up taking 40 minutes. honestly, that was more of a customer issue than an xfinity employee issue.i was at the store because my modem died after (i think) about three years of use. the replacement  modem i picked up at your store friday morning was dead saturday morning. i don’t know why

no… once again i have wasted my time. i normally do not fill out surveys for this very reason. i have worked in customer service management for years and the information i sent, i felt someone would want to know. i am not rewording or resending.
alex took care of me extremely well

i want to comment on the last two visits because i didn't have time to comment and they go together. on the first visit,  mark, cash and anaf were extremely helpful in making our transition to xfinity's phone service relatively smooth. they were very welcoming and informative and helped us through the long and painful process of switching phones. mark, cash and anaf spent a lot of time with us to get our new phones in good working order. we came back a few days later, because samsung was not going to be a good fit for three phones. we came back and mark had bad news. the motorola phones were out of stock,  but mark ordered the phones so we can resolve that issue. we're looking forward to getting the new motorolas and continuing our phone service with xfinity.
fast service and close to my house
both jordan and hunter were wonderful. they answered all my questions and really went beyond what was required. thanks, guys!
my store visit was wonderful.  theman that helped me was friendly and prompt.  i was greeted warmly.  i didn't have to wait. he knew what i needed and i was out the door quickly.
the person was professional when taking care of me.

xfinity's text/email marketing is misleading to its customers. after many years of having both me and my son on my xfinity cellular account and having xfinity internet, being promised a new cellphone at no cost, then waiting in a long line at the xfinity store to have my son's cellphone replaced because of a failure in its screen, only to be told that the free replacement cellphone is only if we have a usable trade-in? that is abuse of a loyal customer relationship and inexpensive usable!

first of all, you can never get hold of anyone on the phone that can speak english so you go into the store and they are so rude at every store we’ve been to, but this one was the worst in oak ridge. there was absolutely no one in there except us and three workers it was like none of them wanted to help us. we canceled all of our services except for internet, and that will be coming soon. the guy could not work with us at all about coming down on the internet prices. you give a new customer a price of $70 a month and ours is 143 and no we did not want the one we have. he said we had to have it. we will be canceling that very soon.

i am incredibly grateful to xfinity for the opportunities, support, and growth i’ve experienced throughout my journey with the company. xfinity has provided an environment where i have been able to develop my leadership skills, build meaningful relationships with both customers and team members, and continuously challenge myself to achieve higher goals. the company’s commitment to innovation, customer service, and employee development inspires me every day. being part of a team that works hard to connect people and make a positive impact in our communities is something i take great pride in. i appreciate the trust, guidance, and encouragement i’ve received, and i am proud to represent a company that values excellence, teamwork, and dedication. xfinity has helped me grow both professionally and personally, and i look forward to continuing to contribute to its success while helping customers find the best solutions for their needs.
